issue: Credentials restored with correct IDs but need real API keys
problem_identified: Credentials are showing 'Needs first setup' because they contain placeholder data instead of real API keys

current_situation.reason: Credentials contain placeholder values like '[AIRTABLE_API_KEY]' instead of real API keys

credentials_with_placeholder_data: Airtable API - needs real Airtable API key
OpenAI API - needs real OpenAI API key
Anthropic API - needs real Anthropic API key
Stripe API - needs real Stripe API key
GitHub API - needs real GitHub token
Slack API - needs real Slack token
Telegram API - needs real Telegram bot token
Webflow OAuth2 API - needs real Webflow token

what_was_restored.credential_data: Only placeholder data, not real API keys

what_needs_to_be_done: Configure each credential with real API keys in n8n UI
Replace placeholder values with actual authentication data
Test each credential to ensure it works
Verify all credentials are properly configured
next_steps: Click on each credential that shows 'Needs first setup'
Enter the real API keys, tokens, and secrets
Verify all credentials are working properly
notes: The credential IDs and structure are correctly restored. The issue is that the actual authentication data (API keys, tokens, secrets) needs to be manually configured in the n8n UI since these are sensitive credentials that cannot be stored in backup files.
